zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Mosse於1499年出生在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。她於1516年與Robert Morse在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1578年1月17日在她的家鄉享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Mosse于1499年出生在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。她于1516年与Robert Morse在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1578年1月17日在她的家乡享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Mosse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moss
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English mos ‘moss, bog’ (Old English mos), for someone who lived at a boggy place, or a habitational name from one or other of the many places so called, such as Moss (Yorkshire), Mose in Quatford (Shropshire), and Moze (Essex).

Irish (Ulster): adoption of the English name 1 by translation for Ó Maolmóna or Ó Maolmhóna ‘descendant of Maolmóna’, a personal name based on maol ‘servant, tonsured one, i.e. devotee’ + a second element assumed to be móin (genitive móna) ‘moorland, peat bog’, in local English ‘moss’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Mosse was born in 1499, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. She married Robert Morse in 1516, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 17 January 1578, in her hometown, at the age of 79, and was buried in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Mosse(은)는 1499년 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1516년 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 Robert Morse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1578년 1월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Mosse родилась в 1499 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Morse в 1516 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 17 января 1578 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
